title: Next.js Task Auto-Assignment
summary: Added natural-language assignment inference for task create/update APIs in imported Next.js app
Supported assign-to phrase, @agent mention, and inline name matching
Auto-sets status=assigned on create when assignment is inferred
rollback_steps: Revert task assignment inference in tasks create/update routes
open_items: Add explicit inference confidence + UI confirmation
Add automated tests for inference edge cases
